hooks.command: cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*(--force|-f\b)|git reset --hard|rm -rf (src|android|ios|node_modules|\.\b)|npm publish|eas (submit|deploy|build --auto-submit)' && { echo "BLOCKED: '$(echo "$cmd" | head -c 80)' — confirm with user first"; exit 2; } || exit 0

file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [[ "$file" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]] && [[ -f "$file" ]] && out=$(pnpm exec eslint --fix "$file" 2>&1); errs=$(echo "$out" | grep -cE '[[:space:]]error[[:space:]]' || true); [[ "$errs" -gt 0 ]] && echo "ESLint: $errs error(s) remaining in $(basename "$file")" && echo "$out" | grep -E '[[:space:]]error[[:space:]]' | tail -5; exit 0
